_note: This file is a design-time snapshot and may be out of date. For current step state, run: iw item-status <ID> --json. The DB is the authoritative source of truth (CR-00023).
title: /system/running 'Failed / Needs Attention' and 'Recently Completed' tables show steps from inactive work items

steps.description: Add active-item predicate (archived_at IS NULL AND status NOT IN (completed, cancelled)) to _query_failed_steps() and _query_recent_completions() in dashboard/routers/running.py; do not touch the running-now helpers or the template
Review S01: predicate correctness (is_(None), correct enum set), scope adherence (no template/running-now/migration), SQLAlchemy 2.0 idiom, lint/format gate

Create tests/dashboard/test_running_router_active_filter.py with 16 tests: 8 helper-level for _query_failed_steps (in_progress, completed, cancelled, archived, failed, paused, needs_fix step-status, project filter), 6 helper-level for _query_recent_completions, 2 route-level smoke tests; semantic-strength assertions on specific item IDs only
Review S03: all 16 tests present and named per design, RED reasoning recorded, assertion strength (no shape-only checks), test isolation under pytest-randomly, no live-DB connections
Cross-step global review: AC1/AC2/AC3/AC4 traceability, predicate ↔ test enum consistency, scope verification (only dashboard/routers/running.py and the new test file changed), TDD RED evidence audit
QV: Browser verification — confirm /system/running and /project/iw-ai-core/running no longer show CR-00023/49/52/54 in the Failed table, no regression to Running Now
Self-assessment of the just-completed item via the iw-item-analyze skill
